name: Orbit Build Rerun Review
description: Run the Orbit build exercise from a fresh main-based lane with explicit learning carry-forward, product gates, and hybrid retrospective closeout.

notes: Use the active Orbit execution and planning docs as the source of truth for the rerun.
Carry forward prior-attempt lessons explicitly; do not restart from vibes or thread memory alone.
Use the exact manifest-approved lane branch for the attempt; do not infer branch identity from the latest historical run.
Do not call the branch review-ready or MVP candidate before the product acceptance checklist and interaction-quality review both exist.
Use hybrid retrospective closeout by default unless AJ explicitly narrows the method for a smaller checkpoint.
Make actual participants and participant evidence explicit; planned roles are not the same as active contributors.
Use an attempt-specific evidence packet path and preserve earlier attempt artifacts as historical evidence.
Record feature, product, process, and persona-fidelity confidence separately.
Do not promote process changes or rerun success claims without AJ review.
